{{Quote|Ello! Yousa got time to hep de Otoh Gunga Zoological Facility? My bein' Facility director. Wesa got a maxibig problem wit outlaunder tourists comen to Naboo and bringin' dey pet animals. De animals had gettin' loose, ruinin' de ecology. Deysa one beast, a blistmok, comen outen Talus. My needin' it killed. Okeyday?|Huff Zinga|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Huff Zinga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] who was the director of the [[Otoh Gunga Zoological Research Facility]] located in [[Kaadara]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

{{Char-stub}}
